caption: A man with a beard and glasses, wearing a dark suit, white shirt, and tie, speaks directly to the camera in a news studio setting. He is positioned in front of a blue digital background featuring a stylized map of Africa and a circular graphic containing the text "PLUS POLITICS". To the left of the man, a red vertical banner displays the "plustv" logo. A lower-third graphic appears across the screen with the text "PLUS POLITICS" in a small red box, followed by the headline "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU" in bold black letters. Below this, a white bar provides information such as "SUBSCRIBE", "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA", "FOLLOW US", and "WATCH ON DSTV CH 408" and "StarTimes CH 308". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a stationary medium shot, with his facial expressions and mouth movements shifting as he speaks.
